title: aeluropus lagopoides subsp. repens
intro: Aeluropus lagopoides subsp. repens, also known as annual couch grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Aeluropus lagopoides subsp. repens can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
